headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob: cdn.pannellum.org unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com cdn.pannellum.org unpkg.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com; worker-src blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com; frame-src 'self' cdn.pannellum.org;

headers.//: Hashované assety jsou content-addressed → lze cachovat natrvalo
HTML nikdy necachovat — odkazuje na aktuální hash bundlu
